m5paper_init.message0: Initialize onboard temperature, humidity and FRAM
m5paper_init.tooltip: Initialize SHT30 using official internal I2C pins GPIO21/22; FRAM address is fixed at 0x50

m5paper_sht_available.message0: Onboard temperature and humidity sensor available

m5paper_sht_value.tooltip: Read SHT30; valid readings are cached for 500ms, read failure returns NAN

m5paper_fram_write_byte.tooltip: Write a byte to the 256-byte FM24C02, the address is automatically limited to 0-255

m5paper_fram_read_byte.tooltip: Read one byte; communication failure returns -1

m5paper_fram_write_text.tooltip: Writes zero-terminated text byte by byte without exceeding the 256-byte capacity

m5paper_fram_read_text.tooltip: Read to the end of 0 or the specified length without exceeding the FRAM capacity
